description_long: This is a double-headed battle axe with a robust, dark wooden handle and ornate metallic fittings. The axe features two large, symmetrical blades with a dark steel finish, each adorned with intricate gold geometric patterns and decorative studs along the edges. The handle is reinforced with metallic bands and capped with a circular pommel, providing both structural integrity and visual appeal. The central section where the blades meet the handle is heavily ornamented, suggesting ceremonial or high-status use. The overall design is reminiscent of medieval or fantasy weaponry, with a focus on both functionality and elaborate decoration. The axe appears solid and heavy, suitable for display or as a prop in themed urban environments such as parks, museums, or themed events.
description: A double-headed battle axe with ornate gold patterns on dark steel blades and a reinforced wooden handle, featuring decorative metallic bands and a circular pommel.
description_view_0: Front view showing both large, symmetrical blades with gold geometric patterns and the full length of the handle.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the axe, with the blades appearing as narrow edges and the handle's metallic reinforcements visible.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the ornate blade designs and handle details from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thin profile and the alignment of the handle and blade edges.
attribute_handle_type: Straight cylindrical wooden handle with dark finish, reinforced by metallic bands and a circular pommel; grip appears smooth and robust.
attribute_blade_design: Double-headed symmetrical blades with wide, curved edges, decorated with gold geometric patterns and studded borders; no beard, with a central mounting hub.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged mounting with visible metallic reinforcement at the blade-handle junction.
